settings.heading: Contact us
settings.text: We'd love to hear from you! Questions about orders, custom designs, or anything else — we're here.
settings.email_sub: We reply as soon as possible
settings.form_sub: We aim to reply within 1-2 business days.
settings.faq_text: We're always happy to help — check out our FAQs or drop us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as possible!

settings.title: Love my hats
settings.text: Fabulous hats, fabulous service, fabulous company. Thank you so much.

settings.text: These are well made, comfortable scrub hats that wash nicely.
